nodes.name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Bake
nodes.description: name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Bake | short_description: A Mediterranean-inspired grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil. This combination offers plant
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Bake - name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Bake | short_description: A Mediterranean-inspired grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil. This combination offers plant-based protein, fiber, calcium, and heart-healthy fats in a bright, fresh package. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a balanced bowl with quinoa and chickpeas as the base, topped with cucumber, tomato, feta, and a drizzle of olive oil. Add lemon juice and fresh herbs (parsley or mint) for brightness; great for meal prep when kept separate from dressings. | nutrition_note: Protein- and fiber-rich due to quinoa and chickpeas; calcium from feta; healthy fats from olive oil; includes vitamins from cucumber and tomato. Moderately high in sodium from feta—substitute reduced-sodium feta or use less cheese to reduce sodium. Naturally gluten-free if quinoa is certified gluten-free; watch for cross-contamination.

nodes.name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Maple-Kissed Set
nodes.description: name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Maple-Kissed Set | short_description: Bean Burrito Bowl with black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar. | meal_suggestion: For a lighter option, use reduced-fat ch
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Bean Burrito Bowl — Maple-Kissed Set - name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Maple-Kissed Set | short_description: Bean Burrito Bowl with black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar. | meal_suggestion: For a lighter option, use reduced-fat cheddar or dairy-free cheese; swap white rice for brown rice to boost fiber; add avocado or extra veggies for healthy fats and micronutrients. | nutrition_note: Balanced vegetarian bowl with plant protein from black beans and fiber from beans and rice; corn and salsa add micronutrients, while cheddar provides calcium and some saturated fat.

nodes.name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Combo

nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Combo - name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Combo | short_description: Bean burrito bowl with black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar—protein- and fiber-rich with veggie toppings and a modest cheese portion. | meal_suggestion: Pair with fresh berries or a berry smoothie to honor the Berry Boost theme; consider adding avocado for healthy fats. | nutrition_note: Protein- and fiber-rich from black beans and rice; calcium from cheddar; vitamins from salsa and lettuce; moderate fat depending on cheese amount. The 'Berry Boost' theme suggests adding berries or a berry side for extra antioxidants.
